strategy: Team fight (19k, Darkmoor). Hit with Life (+20%); he resists Death 50%.

Attack him regularly to reset his Death Interrupt Cycle — it escalates from a 1,050 Vampire (round 2) to Dr. Von's Monster (round 3) to a Beguiling Monster Mash (round 4). A normal attack or DoT resets it; steals, Mana Burn, and Supernova do NOT.
Use Mass Feint, not single Feint — a single Feint makes him Dark Pact himself +30%.
Use multi-target curses (Plague) rather than single negative charms, which make him Sacrifice.

Avoid healing when possible — a heal triggers a 1,050 Vampire on the healer; if you must heal, shield first (note his 40% pierce). Blade the hitter, keep him attacked each round, and burst him and the Darkmoor minions down.
cheatNotes: Put a single Feint on him and he Dark Pacts himself +30% — use Mass Feint instead.
A single negative charm (Weakness, Bad Juju) makes him Sacrifice for 750 — use multi-target curses.
Multi-target curses like Plague don't trigger it.
Heal and he hits the healer with a 1,050 Vampire — shield or avoid heals.
Pet may-cast heals trigger the Vampire too.
Round 2 of his cycle he Vampires a random wizard for 1,050 — attack him to reset the cycle.
Steal spells (Ghoul, Lord of Night) won't reset it.
Mana Burn and Supernova won't reset it.
DoT attacks (Fire Elf, Link) DO reset it — handy.
Round 3 of the cycle he casts Dr. Von's Monster (900) on a wizard.
Round 4 of the cycle he casts Monster Mash (1,170) and Beguiles the wizard — keep him attacked so it never reaches this.
